highlights.headline: BTC MVRV crosses 3.2 — historically frothy territory
highlights.narrative: Bitcoin's market-value-to-realized-value ratio pushed above 3.2 for the first time since the 2021 cycle top. Past readings above 3 preceded 30%+ drawdowns within 90 days in 3 of 4 cases.

highlights.headline: US Core CPI: +0.2pp above forecast
highlights.narrative: Core CPI printed 3.4% year-over-year against a 3.2% consensus — the largest upside surprise in eight months, complicating the September cut narrative.

highlights.headline: Macro regime: Late-cycle expansion
highlights.narrative: The vault's synthesis engine keeps its late-cycle read for a sixth straight week: growth cooling, inflation sticky, risk appetite narrowing to quality.

highlights.headline: NFP ahead: July payrolls land Friday
highlights.narrative: Consensus looks for 140k jobs. A sub-100k print would be the softest since 2024 and put a July cut back on the table.

highlights.headline: Vault crossed 2.1M stored observations
highlights.narrative: Housekeeping milestone; below the default posting threshold on purpose.
